notes: Holmes and Norton meet only once, under unusual circumstances: Holmes is following Irene Adler when he and Norton both arrive at a church, and Norton — frantic because he needs a witness to marry Adler legally — presses Holmes into service. Holmes agrees. It is one of the stranger moments in the canon: Holmes unwittingly facilitating the marriage that removes Adler from the King of Bohemia's reach and defeats his own mission. He describes Norton afterward with a trace of rueful respect — the man moved quickly and got what he wanted.
